title: Withering Hearts
description: A texture pack that changes the wither hearts
body:
This is a resource pack that changes the wither hearts into something much cooler!
![Withered Hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfdc85db6b689b38319cb269d947c94f54c0d5aa.png)

To use this resource pack, open the game, press options, resource packs, open pack folder, and then add the Withering Hearts.zip file into there
